validators.name: agent-review
validators.rubric: Review the produced code and tests for exact task fidelity, correctness, and scope control. Pass only if the internal helper exactly captures the retry/no-op acceptance rule and the tests cover both acceptance and rejection cases.

nodes.description: Make the retry/no-op acceptance rule directly testable. In project/plugins/Plugin.Actors/AgentRuntimeActor.cs, extract the final no-op acceptance condition into a small internal static helper method with a clear name. Then create only project/tests/Plugin.Actors.Tests/AgentRuntimeActorTests.cs with two focused tests: one proving no_op with artifacts is accepted even when AllowNoOpCompletion is false, and one proving no_op without artifacts is still rejected when AllowNoOpCompletion is false. Keep the change tightly scoped to those two files and do not modify any other production behavior.
